name: UL1007 PVC Tinned Copper 16 AWG (6 colors × 5m, Beteno)
description: 6-color hookup wire kit: UL1007 PVC-insulated, stranded tinned copper, 16 AWG. Six 5-meter spools (red, black, yellow, blue, green, white) for a total of 30 m. UL1007 is rated 300V / 80°C with VW-1 flame retardance — suitable for low-voltage 12V/24V DC accessory wiring on boats, panels, and signal runs. Tinned conductor improves corrosion resistance in marine environments.
packageContents: 1 × Printed retail box ("TINNED COPPER WIRE — 6 REEL PACKED")

source.sellerTitle: 6 Colors Mix Kit — UL1007 Wire PVC Insulation Tinned Copper Cable 16 AWG (16AWG 6×5m)
source.auditNotes: Original AliExpress listing 1005007670999760 was delisted/redirected to a different (silicone) wire kit at audit time. Specs reconstructed from: (a) cached seller title confirming UL1007 PVC 16 AWG 6×5 m, (b) product photo showing 6 spool colors (red/black/yellow/blue/green/white), (c) AliExpress category spec rows still served (≤80V marking, Mainland China origin), and (d) the universal UL1007 industry standard (UL Subject 758 — 300V / 80°C / VW-1, 26×0.16 mm tinned copper for 16 AWG, ~1.31 mm² conductor area).
